title: Component Sourcing Passports + Knowledge Gap Register; Hum3D HOLD_REJECTED; demote M300 ACQUIRED
reason: Component-centric maturity tracking and explicit knowledge gaps are required. Operator claimed M300 ACQUIRED/PARSED and 100% channel saturation without local evidence — honesty gate demotes those. Paid Hum3D door shell fails AJR duplication check.
decision: Authorize Component Sourcing Passports (CSP-######) with channel maturity trackers; operator % bars = RESEARCH_DRAFT_ESTIMATE only (Hard Rule 5).
Authorize Knowledge Gap Register; KG-001 CRITICAL (door harness routing), KG-002 HIGH (M300 wall thickness).
Accept AJR-000003 HOLD_REJECTED for AID-000011 / AID-COMP-01 ($79 Hum3D) — visual duplicate of free F-150 crossover path (CL-001 still CANDIDATE).
Reject operator AID-COMP-02 ACQUIRED→PARSED and Exact Match=Yes — AID-000009 remains NOT_ACQUIRED / AJR NOT_CLEARED.
Record MEDIA-000001 as search-discovered door-panel removal video candidate for KG-001 (confirm intended media before authority).
Recommended decision CONTINUE_RESEARCH focused on KG-001 before physical scan authorization.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
